---
title: "More Modelling Recipes"
description: "A collection of data science and actuarial modelling recipes. Simpler posts include reproducible code examples, more complex posts discuss architecture and design."
site: distill::distill_website
listing: 
  posts:
    - 2026-04-05-bot-de-plume
    - 2026-03-08-sketchy-bot
    - 2026-02-15-family-hub
    - 2026-01-15-copilot-studio-pds-agent
    - 2025-10-25-google-ai-studio-projects
    - 2025-08-09-notebooklm-audio
    - 2024-10-06-notebooklm-t1d
    - 2024-01-15-custom-gpts
    - 2023-06-20-price-elasticity
    - 2022-11-10-ui-data
    - 2022-09-16-topic-analysis
    - 2022-03-30-crime-nsw
    - 2022-02-01-trees
    - 2022-01-25-bayesian-applications
    - 2021-11-30-actuaries-cookbook
    - 2021-11-08-life-stats
    - 2021-10-26-network-diagram
    - 2021-10-14-regression 
    - 2021-10-10-data-transformations
---

<div class="posts-list">
<h1 style="font-size: 32px; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 0.25em;">More Modelling Recipes</h1>
<p>A collection of data science and actuarial modelling recipes. Simpler posts include reproducible code examples, more complex posts discuss architecture and design.</p>
</div>

```{r, include=FALSE, results='asis'}
library(metathis)

meta() %>%
  meta_general(
    description =  "A collection of data science and actuarial modelling recipes. Simpler posts include reproducible code examples, more complex posts discuss architecture and design."
  ) %>% 
  meta_social(
    url = "https://pat-reen.github.io/more-modelling-recipes/",
    image = "img/image.png",
    og_type = "website",
    og_author = "Pat Reen",
  )
```
